case_title: IANTORNO, SERGIO DBA REALTY WEST. VS PAREDES, GILBERTO et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAREDES, GILBERTO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IANTORNO, SERGIO DBA REALTY WEST.
